name: analyst
description: Transform vague business requirements into structured BRDs, business flows, stakeholder maps, and measurable success criteria (KPIs). Triggers on: requirement, BRD, stakeholder, business, analyze, business flow, success criteria, วิเคราะห์, ความต้องการ, ธุรกิจ, ผู้มีส่วนได้เสีย, KPI. Replaces busine
